videos.title: SME perlu pilih MBSB Bank?
videos.summary: As an Islamic financial advocate, navigating banking options that align with Shariah principles is crucial. This video breaks down why SMEs should consider MBSB Bank, giving you a practical look at a banking institution known for its Islamic banking focus in the Malaysian market.

videos.title: [S01:E10] Saham di Malaysia terlalu rendah, ramai beralih ke saham US - Tusvendran, Niaga Saham
videos.summary: This deep dive into why investors are shifting from the Malaysian stock market to US markets provides essential context for any local investor. It offers a professional analysis of market trends that will help you better understand asset allocation and global versus local investment opportunities.

videos.title: The Math Behind Every $100K Business
videos.summary: For a junior dev looking to level up their career, understanding the mechanics of a $100K business is eye-opening. It demystifies how value is created and scaled, which is a vital skill if you eventually want to move into freelancing, consulting, or starting your own venture alongside your software engineering career.

videos.title: Emosi punca pelabur rugi?
videos.summary: Emotional regulation is the biggest pitfall for new investors in Malaysia. This video hits on the psychological traps that lead to losses, providing the grounded financial mindset you need to keep your head cool while building long-term wealth.
